SPS Order 
ONLY SHIP ON REQUESTED SHIP DATE.
 Ship Order on FedEx.com. 
 in Billing Details select COLLECT (Authorized Ground Accounts Only) - DO NOT CHARGE SHIPPING

After you create ASN, please print and apply GS128 label from SPS to the cartons. 
 *Print and AFFIX BASS PRO PACKING SLIPS TO EACH SHIPPING CARTON! TAKE PICTURES OF ORDER, SHIPMENTS CARTONS W/ CLEAR GS128 LABELS SHOWING

Make sure to fill out Shipment References
*Cin7 order number - <Order Ref>
*PO Number: <PO Number>
*Invoice Number
